headline: Allegiant Q1 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates, Improve Y/Y
summary: ALGT tops Q1 EPS and revenue estimates as passenger sales rose 8.9% and load factor hit 84.4%, and Q2 ASM is forecasted to decrease 6.5%.
